title: Separate donations of usufruct and naked ownership
doc_html:
Art. 1522. Separate donations of usufruct and naked ownership

             A disposition inter vivos or mortis causa by which the usufruct is given to one person and the naked ownership to another is not a prohibited substitution.

            Acts 2016, No. 86, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 1522.  Separate donations of usufruct and naked ownership

inter vivos
or
mortis causa
by which the usufruct is given to one
person and the naked ownership to another is not a prohibited substitution.
Acts 2016, No. 86, §1.
